instruction: 각 그룹의 sample_logs와 anchor를 확인한 뒤 gt_ 필드를 채워주세요. gt_is_true_positive: 해당 그룹이 실제 공격 행위인지 (true/false). gt_technique_id: 실제 MITRE technique ID (예: T1059.001). gt_tactic: 실제 tactic 이름 (예: Execution). gt_notes: 판단 근거나 메모.

groups.gt_notes: EID 4624 generic logon — not remote svc (T1021.003) and not attack-relevant
EID 4648 explicit-creds logon — Invoke-RunAs CreateProcessWithLogonW signature
EID 5857 WMI provider load — background, not attack
cmd.exe creates wscript autoupdate.vbs (EID 4688 dup of above)
wscript.exe image load for VBS exec
PowerShell outbound HTTP — Empire agent C2
notepad.exe EID 3 — ambiguous, not core to Invoke-RunAs chain
wscript registry modify — not part of Invoke-RunAs core chain
